Article Title: Narendra Modi: Watch: PM Modi plays football in Gangtok; showcases dribbling skills, scores goal, high-fives youngsters
Article Text:
Prime Minister Narendra Modi playing football with youngsters in Sikkim

PM Modi on the field in Gangtok

NEW DELHI: Prime Minister Narendra Modi , currently on a two-day visit to Sikkim, on Tuesday shared a video of himself playing football with youngsters in Gangtok.In the video posted by the Prime Minister on Instagram, PM Modi is seen in a blue sports jacket, taking a shot at goal before celebrating with the young players.He is also seen cheering and exchanging high-fives with the group, who are dressed in matching kits and carrying footballs.Earlier in the day, PM Modi had shared pictures from the interaction. “Nothing like playing some football with my young friends in Sikkim on a lovely Gangtok morning!,” he wrote on X, alongside images of the session. In another post, he added, “Clearly, an energising football session with these youngsters!”The informal sporting moment came amid the Prime Minister’s official visit to the Himalayan state. Later in the day, PM Modi attended the closing ceremony marking 50 years of Sikkim’s statehood and launched development projects worth over Rs 4,000 crore.Officials said the projects span sectors including infrastructure, connectivity, healthcare, education, power, urban development, environment, tourism and agriculture, and are aimed at boosting holistic and inclusive development in the state.The visit marks a key milestone in Sikkim’s golden jubilee year, reflecting the government’s "continued commitment to the rapid and sustainable development of the Himalayan state."
Article Summary: PM Narendra Modi is currently on a two-day visit to Sikkim. PM Modi shared a video of himself playing football with youngsters in Gangtok. The informal sporting moment came amid the Prime Minister’s official visit to the Himalayan state.

Article Title: Pm Modi: PM Modi joins youngsters for friendly football game in Gangtok during Sikkim visit; shares pictures
Article Text:
Prime Minister Narendra Modi in Sikkim

PM Modi plays football with youngsters

Poll Is it important for political leaders to engage in recreational activities? Yes, it builds rapport No, focus should be on policies

NEW DELHI: Prime Minister Narendra Modi , currently on a two-day visit to Sikkim, on Tuesday shared pictures of himself playing football with youngsters in Gangtok.Dressed in a blue sports jacket featuring the tricolour, PM Modi is seen walking alongside a group of young footballers in matching kits, each carrying a football, in what appeared to be a casual morning session on the field."Nothing like playing some football with my young friends in Sikkim on a lovely Gangtok morning!," the Prime Minister wrote in a post on X, sharing images of the interaction.In another post, he added, "Clearly, an energising football session with these youngsters!"The informal sporting moment comes amid PM Modi’s official engagements in the Himalayan state. He is scheduled to attend the closing ceremony marking 50 years of Sikkim’s statehood and launch development projects worth over Rs 4,000 crore.As part of his itinerary, the Prime Minister will also visit the orchidarium at Swarnajayanti Maitri Manjari Park in Gangtok, developed as a world-class orchid experience centre.Tight security arrangements have been put in place across the state capital and nearby areas for the visit.Later in the day, PM Modi will head to Paljor Stadium to participate in the statehood celebrations, where he is also expected to address a gathering.The projects to be launched span sectors including infrastructure, connectivity, healthcare, education, power, urban development, environment, tourism and agriculture.On Monday, PM Modi had earlier led a roadshow in Gangtok on Monday evening after arriving in the state.He was initially scheduled to attend the 50th statehood celebrations at Paljor Stadium on May 29 last year but could not reach due to inclement weather. He had addressed the event via video conferencing at the time and had assured that he would visit Sikkim in person in the future.
Article Summary: Prime Minister Narendra Modi is currently on a two-day visit to Sikkim. PM Modi shared pictures of himself playing football with youngsters in Gangtok. The informal sporting moment comes amid PM Modi’s official engagements in the Himalayan state. He is scheduled to attend the closing ceremony marking 50 years of the statehood.

Article Title: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi: 'Unfair on her achievements': Internet fumes after Olympic medallist Manu Bhaker asked about Vaibhav Sooryavanshi
Article Text:
Vaibhav Sooryavanshi and Manu Bhaker (Photos from PTI and Screengrab)

Watch Ashok Sharma story: Inside the village and house which shaped India's new pace sensation Ashok Sharma story: Inside the village and house which shaped India's new pace sensation

Poll Which young Indian athlete are you most excited about? Manu Bhaker Vaibhav Sooryavanshi

NEW DELHI: An interaction at the National Rifle Association of India (NRAI) 75th anniversary event in Delhi has sparked debate online after Olympic medallist Manu Bhaker was asked about teenage cricket sensation Vaibhav Sooryavanshi.The exchange, intended as a cross-sport reference between two young Indian sporting names, quickly shifted focus away from the shooter’s own achievements, triggering criticism on social media about misplaced framing of the question.When asked about the 15-year-old cricketing sensation Sooryavanshi, Bhaker, however, responded thoughtfully, stressing guidance and environment over age.She said: "I would say that if the mentorship is good, the company around him is good, and the people around are good, then age is just a number. And there is no age for talent.""Great things happen at 60, they happen at six. So if the people around him mentor him well and guide him properly, then I am sure he will be the next big star," the 24-year-old explained, highlighting the importance of support systems for young athletes transitioning into elite sport discussions.However, the framing of the question drew sharp reactions online, with many arguing that it sidelined Bhaker’s own Olympic success.Prominent social media figure and former KKR team director Joy Bhattacharjya wrote: "Folks, she is an Olympic medallist. To ask her what she thinks of Vaibhav Sooryavanshi is unfair to her achievements and her sport. Cricket anyway is the ruling passion of the country; your sports editors do not need another celebrity quote to spin a headline on Sooryavanshi. Optionally, next time ask Vaibhav Sooryavanshi about Manu Bhaker and see the looks you get. "Other social media users also echoed similar sentiments, noting how athletes from non-cricket sports are often pulled into cricket-centric narratives, especially in headline-driven coverage cycles.Meanwhile, Vaibhav Sooryavanshi continues to draw attention in cricketing circles with milestones in IPL performances.At 15, he has already become the youngest player to reach 1,000 T20 runs and has registered mult ipl e standout knocks in the IPL season, including centuries and high strike-rate innings.His India U19 record reflects prolific scoring, establishing him as one of the most closely watched young batters in the system. Many have already expressed their opinion that they would like to see Sooryavanshi playing for India's senior team soon.
Article Summary: Olympic medallist Manu Bhaker was asked about teenage cricket sensation Vaibhav Sooryavanshi. The exchange, intended as a cross-sport reference, quickly shifted focus away from the shooter’s own achievements. Bhaker, however, responded thoughtfully, stressing guidance and environment over age. At 15, he has already become the youngest player to reach 1,000 T20 runs.

Article Title: Royal Bengal battle in the offing as Suvendu takes on Didi at Bhowanipore
Article Text:
Mamata Banerjee, Suvendu Adhikari

Watch “Fix Delhi And Pahalgam First” West Bengal CM Mamata Banerjee Launches Fierce Attack On BJP “Fix Delhi And Pahalgam First” West Bengal CM Mamata Banerjee Launches Fierce Attack On BJP

One seat, many challenges

Poll Who do you think will win the Bhowanipore constituency in the upcoming elections? Mamata Banerjee (Trinamool Congress) Suvendu Adhikari (BJP)

Kolkata: Battleground Bengal's defining contest is playing out in south Kolkata's Bhowanipore, where CM Mamata Banerjee faces one-time aide Suvendu Adhikari of BJP in what is an electoral rematch of far greater consequence than when she narrowly lost to him in Nandigram in 2021.For Trinamool Congress, retaining Bhowanipore isn't just about securing Mamata's fortress and preserving the aura of invincibility around her. In many ways, the constituency represents the party's conflict with BJP over the larger issues of identity, ideology and governance.BJP breaching Mamata's citadel would deal a psychological blow to Trinamool even if the saffron party fails to win Bengal.The constituency's social mix makes it an unusually sensitive poll pocket. It includes the so-called Bengali bhadralok households, Marwari and Gujarati business families, Sikh and Jain residents, settlers from Bihar and Odisha and a sizeable Muslim electorate."This diversity has turned the seat into a laboratory of competing political methods," said Trinamool's ward 70 councillor Ashim Bose, whose challenge is to convert last year's Lok Sabha deficit in his ward into a lead for Mamata.Numbers explain why both sides are oozing confidence in Bhowanipore. CM Mamata won the 2021 byelection there by a record margin of 59,000 votes. But in the 2024 Lok Sabha election, Trinamool's lead in the assembly segment shrank to a little over 8,000. BJP led in five of the eight wards, suggesting that while Trinamool retained emotional capital, the saffron party gained territorial depth.Mamata's goal is to stop Bhowanipore from turning into a fragmented social contest. Her party's strategy rests on familiarity and emotional ownership. Its "ghorer meye" (daughter of the house) pitch seeks to reduce the election from a verdict on governance to a neighbourhood show of loyalty."Had there been any other contestant from the seat, it would have been extremely challenging for us," Trinamool worker Subhankar Roychowdhury said.That approach suits a constituency where coexistence has often mattered as much as ideological mobilisation. In mixed wards where Bengali Hindus, non-Bengali traders and Muslims live in proximity, Trinamool's emphasis on continuity and emotional belonging is designed to reassure rather than provoke.Mamata's appeal in such areas has long rested on welfare delivery, symbolic accessibility and the perception that she protects a plural urban social order.BJP's strategy is the opposite. Adhikari's poll managers have tried to break the constituency into its constituent communities and convert each into a manageable electoral bloc. During the campaign, this was noticeable in wards 63, 70, 71, 72 and 74, where BJP's recent gains suggest growing receptivity among non-Bengali traders and sections of the Hindu middle class.Muslim voters also remain central to the arithmetic. They account for a quarter of the electorate, and cohesive minority voting in a close urban seat can offset fragmentation among Hindu groups. That is why reported deletions and scrutiny in the electoral rolls matter. BJP worker Jayanta Ghosh said the 11,000-odd Muslim voters struck off the rolls in Ward 77 during SIR could loosen Trinamool's grip."Bhowanipore encapsulates the X factor in Bengal's electoral calculus, going beyond a battle for prestige. Ours is a constituency where the mixed population in each ward forces both parties to test the limits of emotion, arithmetic and polarisation," said Rajan Majumdar, an octogenarian Left Front supporter.
Article Summary: West Bengal's defining contest is playing out in south Kolkata's Bhowanipore. CM Mamata Banerjee faces one-time aide Suvendu Adhikari of BJP. The constituency's social mix makes it an unusually sensitive poll pocket.

Article Title: Ajay Maken Reveals AAP's 7 RS MPs Average Worth of Rs 818 Crore Amid Defections to BJP
Article Text:
The political arena heats up as Congress voices its discontent over AAP's Rajya Sabha nominees, branding them as elitists with an impressive average net worth of Rs 818 crore. Ajay Maken argues that AAP functions as a puppet for the BJP, orchestrated to disrupt Congress's support in upcoming state elections.

Watch Raghav Chadha Blames ‘Sheesh Mahal’ for AAP’s Delhi Poll Defeat, Fresh Attack Raghav Chadha Blames ‘Sheesh Mahal’ for AAP’s Delhi Poll Defeat, Fresh Attack

NEW DELHI: With AAP’s seven Rajya Sabha MPs joining BJP , Congress said Arvind Kejriwal nominated members to the upper House based on their monetary muscle, claiming the average worth of the present defectors stands at Rs 818 crore.Congress treasurer Ajay Maken told a press conference that all seven who left AAP for BJP were millionaires who had never even issued a statement in favour of AAP till they were nominated to Parliament. “What kind of Aam Aadmi is this? Kejriwal should change the party’s name to ‘crorepati aadmi’,” he said.“I tried to calculate the net worth of the seven MPs, but the sum was mind boggling. So, I settled for an average. And, it crosses Rs 818 crore per MP,” Maken said.Maken claimed he always knew about RS nominations in AAP, as Sushil Gupta, who was a Congress office-bearer, had come to him in 2017 and asked to be relieved of the party membership because “he had a ‘setting’ in AAP and would be made an RS MP”.He said the mass defection to BJP has exposed the reality that BJP had created AAP as a proxy to counter Congress, which it was not able to fight till 2014. “The two best administrators seen by India were Sheila Dikshit and Manmohan Singh, and Kejriwal was used to defame them...itled BJP to come to power,” he said.Maken said AAP fights elections in states where Congress and BJP are locked in direct contests and benefits BJP by splitting votes, naming Haryana, Goa, Gujarat as some of them.“We always knew the reality but the mask has now fallen for INDIA bloc partners and we hope they will see AAP’s reality,” he said, as he underlined that Congress stitched an electoral tie-up with Kejriwal under pressure from INDIA allies.He claimed BJP is playing a dangerous game through defections as it now has 86% of MPs from Punjab while it got just 6.6% votes in the 2022 state elections. “Separatists use the claim that voice of Punjab is being suppressed. BJP’s game of usurping MPs from Punjab is only giving a handle to separatists,” he said, adding there is already a pattern in play that precedes separatism and terrorism – drugs, gang wars, criminals, that is rampant in AAP-governed Punjab now.
Article Summary: Congress treasurer Ajay Maken said all seven who left AAP for BJP were millionaires who had never even issued a statement in favour of AAP. “What kind of Aam Aadmi is this? Kejriwal should change the party’s name to ‘crorepati aadmi’,” he said. He said the mass defection to BJP has exposed the reality that BJP had created AAP as a proxy to counter Congress.

Article Title: ASI misleading court by 'shifting stands' in Bhojshala case, HC told
Article Text:
Bhojshala/Kamal Maula Mosque complex after a team of the Archaeological Survey of India (ASI) reached the complex for a survey, in Dhar. (PTI Photo)

Indore: The Indore bench of Madhya Pradesh high court hearing the Bhojshala-Kamal Maula mosque case was told Monday that the stand of Archaeological Survey of India (ASI) on the religious character of the disputed monument has been inconsistent in submissions made in different petitions over time, reports Salil Mekaad.Apperaing on behalf of a group of interveners, senior advocate Shobha Menon said: "ASI cannot mislead this court under any circumstances... The other day you say it is not a mosque, then you say it is not a temple..."
Article Summary: Madhya Pradesh high court told that the stand of Archaeological Survey of India (ASI) on the religious character of the disputed monument has been inconsistent in submissions made in different petitions over time. Senior advocate Shobha Menon said: "ASI cannot mislead this court under any circumstances"

Article Title: Death bridges LoC divide as relatives in PoK bid farewell across river
Article Text:
Image courtesy: X

SRINAGAR: Grief paused at a border that rarely yields. A coffin set by the narrow Kishanganga river in Keran sector of J&K became a bridge of sight, if not touch, as mourners gathered on both sides of LoC, calling out across distance for a final farewell.In Keran — a village in north Kashmir’s Kupwara district that sits right along LoC — a funeral turned into a cross-border moment of shared mourning. Kishanganga, known as Neelum across in PoK, cuts through the settlement, separating families split by decades of conflict.Liyaqat Ali Khan, a revenue official posted in Ganderbal, died after suffering a cardiac arrest while on duty. He had been undergoing treatment at Sher-i-Kashmir Institute of Medical Sciences in Srinagar for four days before his death.By the time his body reached his village Saturday, word had travelled beyond. Relatives across LoC, many of whom had tracked his condition on social media, gathered on the opposite bank. The coffin was brought to the river’s edge, allowing them one last glimpse.Videos now widely shared show mourners crying out from across the divide as funeral rites were performed. “It was a very emotional moment for all of us. They were watching from the PoK Dak Bungalow lawns and wailing,” a resident said.Village head Majaz Ahmad said several of Khan’s close relatives, including siblings, had moved across during migrations of the 1990s, leaving families permanently split. Khan is survived by his wife and two children.Such “divided families” are common along LoC, where borders run through homes, fields and kinship lines. Efforts to reconnect them have flickered over years. In 2005, then PM Manmohan Singh flagged off the Srinagar–Muzaffarabad bus service, known as Karwaan-e-Aman, offering a rare link across the divide. Cross-LoC trade followed in 2008 along routes including Uri–Muzaffarabad and Poonch–Rawalakot, operating on a barter system before being suspended in 2019 over misuse for smuggling.On a riverbank in Keran, policy and politics faded for a moment. Only voices carried across water as a family, separated by an invisible line, said goodbye together.
Article Summary: Liyaqat Ali Khan, a revenue official posted in Ganderbal, died after suffering a cardiac arrest while on duty. He had been undergoing treatment at Sher-i-Kashmir Institute of Medical Sciences in Srinagar for four days.

Article Title: Luka Doncic injury update: Doctor provides realistic return timeline for Lakers’ star
Article Text:
Luka Doncic. Image via: Cary Edmondson-Imagn Images

Doctor provides timeline on Luka Doncic's return



Los Angeles Lakers vs Houston Rockets Game 5: Injury updates and more



There’s good news and bad news. The good news is that Luka Doncic is getting better, and the bad news is that he is still out, and there’s only hope for his return if the Lakers sustain in the next playoff series. Still, sports doctor Jesse Morse provides a realistic timeline for his return, considering the extent of his injury.The star guard has resumed controlled on-court movement after weeks of limited activity, signaling a shift in his recovery from a Grade 2 left hamstring strain. It is not a full return yet, far from it, but it is the first real sign that the long wait may soon ease.The Luka Doncic injury update gains sharper clarity when viewed through a medical lens. Sports doctor Jesse Morse pointed out that this stage of rehab often hints at a return window of 10 to 14 days. That projection places Doncic’s possible comeback between May 6 and May 10, provided there are no setbacks. “Sounds like Luka Doncic is about 10-14 days away from returning to the court,” Morse wrote on X.Doncic has been sidelined since April 2, the same night Austin Reaves went down. During that stretch, the Slovenian star even traveled to Europe for specialized treatment, an indication of how seriously the Lakers are treating this injury.Insider Jovan Buha previously suggested a return in Game 1 or Game 2 of the second round, which aligns closely with the medical outlook.Head coach JJ Redick kept expectations measured while offering a glimpse into the next phase. "Most of his stuff [before] had been standstill," Redick said ahead of Game 4. "He's progressing, but no update on any timeline or anything like that."For now, though, the focus remains on patience. According to Shams Charania, Doncic will not return in this series against the Houston Rockets, even if it stretches to seven games. The Lakers appear determined not to rush their centerpiece, especially with deeper playoff ambitions in sight.Game 5 between the Los Angeles Lakers and the Houston Rockets arrives with plenty at stake and a few notable absences. The Lakers hold a 3-1 series lead and can close things out on April 29 in Los Angeles, but their lineup will still look different.Reaves is expected to make his playoff debut this season, stepping into a backcourt role alongside Marcus Smart, while LeBron James continues to anchor the group. Rui Hachimura and Deandre Ayton round out a lineup built to absorb the loss of Doncic, at least for now.Houston faces its own challenge. Reports indicate Kevin Durant will not be available, leaving a young core led by Amen Thompson and Alperen Sengun to extend the series. Both teams are missing key pieces, yet the urgency feels unchanged. One side looks to advance. The other fights to stay alive.If the Lakers finish the job, a second-round clash with the defending champions, the Oklahoma City Thunder, likely awaits. And by then, the timeline surrounding Doncic may no longer be theoretical.
Article Summary: Doctor provides timeline on Luka Doncic's return from hamstring injury. Sports doctor Jesse Morse says Slovenian star could return between May 6 and May 10. Lakers hold a 3-1 series lead and can close things out on April 29 in Los Angeles.

Article Title: NFL Trade Rumor: Miami Dolphins could make bold move for $120M San Francisco 49ers star to support new starting QB
Article Text:
Miami Dolphins make bold move for $120M San Francisco 49ers star to support new starting QB.(Image via X)

Miami Dolphins tipped to make a move for San Francisco 49ers ’ star, Brandon Aiyuk

The Miami Dolphins have suffered on the field in the last few seasons as the team failed to qualify in the playoffs for the second consecutive year.With just 7 wins and 10 losses in the last season, all eyes are on how the Miami Dolphins plan to bounce back on the field in the next season.A few hours ago, Bleacher Report’s Julia Stumbaugh predicted that there could be a chance that the Miami Dolphins might make a move for the San Francisco 49ers’ star player, Brandon Aiyuk.Bleacher Report’s Julia Stumbaugh noted, “Another team where Aiyuk could potentially slot in as a WR1 are the Miami Dolphins, who have three wide receivers with relatively limited recent production in Malik Washington, Jalen Tolbert and Tutu Atwell.”Bleacher Report’s Julia Stumbaugh added, “The Dolphins could be looking to add a more experienced option for Malik Willis ahead of his first full campaign as starting quarterback.”However, the Miami Dolphins have not responded to the trade talks concerning Brandon Aiyuk yet.As Brandon Aiyuk remains with the San Francisco 49ers even after the NFL Draft, the team’s general manager, John Lynch, has opened up about how they are open to exploring trade options for him.A few hours ago, as per NFL.com, John Lynch said, “We’re available. Give us a call…”The San Francisco 49ers’ general manager added, “He’s an extremely talented player. He’s been an extremely effective player in our league — situation didn’t work itself out here.”John Lynch continued, “That’s not to say that it can’t be rekindled somewhere else. And we’d be happy to do something with anyone if the opportunity presented itself.”Over the last few seasons, Brandon Aiyuk has struggled on the field as he dealt with brutal injuries.Just days after signing a whopping $120 million extension with the San Francisco 49ers in 2024, Brandon Aiyuk tore his ACL and MCL at a match against the Chiefs as he was ruled out for the rest of the season.Brandon Aiyuk finished the 2024 season with 25 receptions for 374 yards in seven games and starts as many hoped he would bounce back on the field.Despite his progress reports, even as John Lynch had hinted at his recovery, Brandon Aiyuk was placed on the PUP list on 18th July, 2025.While the last two seasons have been brutal for him, all eyes are on where Brandon Aiyuk ends up in the next season.
Article Summary: Miami Dolphins tipped to make a move for San Francisco 49ers ’ star, Brandon Aiyuk. The Miami Dolphins failed to qualify in the playoffs for the second consecutive year. The Dolphins could be looking to add a more experienced option for Malik Willis ahead of his first full campaign as starting quarterback.

Article Title: Jaden Ivey turns page on controversy with wife by his side with a heartfelt message
Article Text:
Jaden Ivey and wife Caitlyn. Image via: Instagram

Jaden Ivey and his wife, Caitlyn, share an intimate moment



Jaden Ivey and his wife, Caitlyn. Image via: poisonivey/ Instagram

What happened between Jaden Ivey and his wife, Caitlyn



Jaden Ivey turns the page on controversy with his wife by his side with a heartfelt message, offering a glimpse into a calmer chapter after weeks of tension. The 24-year-old guard, currently without a team, appeared alongside his wife in a joint social media post that felt both simple and intentional. It was not loud or defensive. It was quiet, warm, and personal.The image showed Jaden Ivey and Caitlyn Ivey smiling together, a contrast to the headlines that followed his release from the Chicago Bulls. The caption leaned on faith, quoting scripture, and added a line that drew attention. “Thank you Jesus for saving us,” he wrote. “Thank you for your mercy and goodness towards us.”The moment felt deliberate. After a stretch of public back and forth, the couple chose a softer tone. Their post included a verse from Proverbs 18:22: “Whoso findeth a wife findeth a good thing, And obtaineth favour of the LORD.” It read less like a statement and more like a reset.Just weeks earlier, the situation looked very different. Ivey had gone live on social media, speaking openly about feeling isolated after his exit from Chicago. In that stream, he suggested his wife had stopped responding to him, saying she was “not even texting me.”The comment quickly drew attention and raised questions about their relationship.Caitlyn responded soon after, pushing back on that claim. “We were communicating all morning of that day,” she wrote. “People say things for attention, do not be deceived.” She followed it with a stronger message. “If you know me you know I have never once abandoned that man through all the trials… and I still haven’t now,” she added. “There is obviously a lot more going on, so leave your conspiracies and guesses to yourselves. ”The tension unfolded during a difficult period for Ivey, both on and off the court. His release from the Bulls followed controversial remarks that brought criticism and, at times, isolation. In the same livestream, he spoke about feeling misunderstood by those closest to him.“Those who are around me, those who are my family members betraying me because of what I spoke," he said. "The truth. Betraying me. Saying that I'm losing my mind. Saying that I'm crazy. Saying that I don't know the truth. Those who raised me said that I don't know the truth. 'Man, he's psycho.' He's this, he's that. Those are my own household. All because of the gospel. All because I said the truth. … My wife is in here, and she's not even texting me. ”That moment painted a picture of strain. Yet the recent post suggests something has shifted, at least privately. While his next step in basketball remains unclear, the tone around his personal life feels steadier. For now, the image and message stand on their own, offering a quiet sign that the story may not be as fractured as it once seemed.
Article Summary: Jaden Ivey and his wife, Caitlyn, posted an intimate picture on Instagram. The image was a contrast to the headlines that followed his release from the Chicago Bulls. The 24-year-old guard, currently without a team, appeared alongside his wife in a joint social media post.

Article Title: Mike Vrabel: “Absolutely horrible": Legendary radio host rips Mike Vrabel viral clip as Dianna Russini’s husband refuses to go silent on social media
Article Text:
Legendary radio host rips Mike Vrabel viral clip as Dianna Russini’s husband refuses to go silent on social media(Getty Images)

Famous radio host Jim Rome rips viral Mike Vrabel–Dianna Russini viral clip



Dianna Russini's husband stays online as Mike Vrabel addresses fallout and Patriots feel impact

The Dianna Russini–Mike Vrabel scandal refuses to slow down. What started with viral photos earlier in April has now taken over headlines, even during the 2026 NFL Draft weekend. The story has moved far beyond curiosity and into serious public scrutiny.Now, a resurfaced interview clip and a sharp reaction from a major media voice and radio host, Jim Rome, have pushed things further. At the same time, a quiet move from Russini’s husband has added a new twist that people cannot ignore.The latest flashpoint came when Jim Rome addressed the controversy on “The Jim Rome Show”. The viral clip he reacted to showed Dianna Russini interviewing Mike Vrabel soon after he became the Patriots' head coach, with the conversation turning to his wife, Jen Vrabel.Rome made it clear he found the exchange troubling. “I mean, guys. What are you thinking there?” Rome said on his show. “How can you go there? How can you be unaware of the possibility? Because at this point, the two of them were carrying on. And she brings up his wife?”He continued by pointing out how damaging the clip looks now. “One, how can you do that? And two, how can you be so unaware that one day that clip would make both of you look absolutely horrible?” he added during the same segment.Rome’s strongest line captured the backlash around the Dianna Russini–Mike Vrabel controversy.“That’s the type of thing that has commenters saying, ‘See you both in hell.’ Completely jacked up,” he said.While the criticism keeps building, the personal side has also come into focus. Russini stepped back from public platforms and made her accounts private as the backlash grew.Due to the ongoing rumours, Russini's husband has received too much unwanted attention. Plus, Russini had already made many strange jokes about her husband's expenses while on the job, but he’s now being forced to put up with some intense scrutiny, thanks to a bombshell photo release. Russini has made her Instagram account private and gone off X.Naturally, such behaviour is typical of folks involved in such situations. Her husband was expected to do the same. But the Shake Shack exec has done the opposite. As of now, he has kept his LinkedIn and other profiles active, which has drawn attention as many expected him to go silent. Looking into the situation, he would have disconnected from social media, but Goldschmidt chose to focus on his work.At the same time, Vrabel has started responding. Speaking to reporters last week, he admitted to “difficult conversations” and accepted responsibility. “We believe that in order to be successful on and off the field, you have to make good decisions,” Vrabel said. “That includes me, that starts with me.”He also missed Day 3 of the 2026 NFL Draft to begin counseling, a sign that the situation has affected the team. The Patriots had to operate without their head coach for part of a key weekend. With fresh reactions, resurfaced clips, and constant attention, the Dianna Russini–Mike Vrabel scandal continues to grow, and the spotlight is not fading anytime soon.
Article Summary: The Dianna Russini–Mike Vrabel scandal refuses to slow down. A resurfaced interview clip and a sharp reaction from a major media voice and radio host, Jim Rome, have pushed things further. At the same time, a quiet move from Russini’s husband has added a new twist that people cannot ignore.

Article Title: Ipl Purple Cap: IPL 2026 Purple Cap: Bhuvneshwar Kumar surges ahead after record-breaking spell
Article Text:
Bhuvneshwar Kumar celebrates after taking a DC wicket. (Pic credit: IPL)

Watch IPL 2026: LSG's Justin Langer explains where they lost vs KKR IPL 2026: LSG's Justin Langer explains where they lost vs KKR

Latest IPL 2026 Purple Cap standings

Ave. 1 Bhuvneshwar Kumar (RCB) 14 8 31.0 7.61 16.85 2 Anshul Kamboj (CSK) 14 8 27.4 8.56 16.92 3 Eshan Malinga (SRH) 14 8 27.0 9.44 18.21 4 Jofra Archer (RR) 13 8 29.0 8.03 17.92 5 Prince Yadav (LSG) 13 8 30.0 8.06 18.61 6 Kagiso Rabada (GT) 13 8 31.0 9.48 22.61 7 Prasidh Krishna (GT) 12 7 26.0 10.34 22.41 8 Ravi Bishnoi (RR) 11 8 24.0 9.54 20.81 9 Mohsin Khan (LSG) 9 4 16.0 6.37 11.33 10 Krunal Pandya (RCB) 9 8 27.0 8.85 26.55

Powerplay carnage sets up emphatic win

NEW DELHI: Veteran seamer Bhuvneshwar Kumar delivered a performance for the ages, not only powering Royal Challengers Bengaluru to a crushing win over Delhi Capitals but also storming to the top of the Purple Cap standings in IPL 2026. His sensational spell of 3 for 5 in three overs marked his 20th three-wicket haul in the IPL, making him only the second pacer after Jasprit Bumrah to achieve the milestone.With this effort, Bhuvneshwar took his tally to 14 wickets from eight matches, drawing level with Chennai Super Kings’ Anshul Kamboj and Sunrisers Hyderabad’s Eshan Malinga. However, his superior economy rate of 7.61 — compared to Kamboj’s 8.56 and Malinga’s 9.44 — helped him snatch the Purple Cap.Rajasthan Royals’ Jofra Archer and Lucknow Super Giants’ Prince Yadav follow closely with 13 wickets each.The match itself was defined by a brutal new-ball spell as Bhuvneshwar and Josh Hazlewood combined to dismantle DC’s batting line-up. The hosts were left reeling at 13 for 6 in the powerplay, with Bhuvneshwar striking early by castling debutant Sahil Parakh and later removing Tristan Stubbs and skipper Axar Patel.Hazlewood complemented him perfectly, returning with figures of 4 for 12 as DC collapsed to 75 in 16.3 overs.Reflecting on his performance, Bhuvneshwar credited the conditions and early swing. “When the ball swings and you get a few wickets upfront, it makes it easier,” he said, adding that the team was slightly surprised by the assistance on offer but made the most of it. He also joked about not pushing for an extra over due to fatigue, saying he was “happy with three overs” considering the heat.Chasing a modest target, RCB completed the job with ease in just 6.3 overs. Virat Kohli and Devdutt Padikkal ensured there were no hiccups, with Kohli sealing the win in style with consecutive sixes.
Article Summary: Bhuvneshwar Kumar takes 14 wickets to top Purple Cap standings. RCB beat Delhi Capitals by eight wickets in IPL 2026. Virat Kohli and Devdutt Padikkal sealed win with consecutive sixes.

Article Title: Austin Reaves injury update: Latest on Lakers star’s Game 5 status
Article Text:
Austin Reaves. Image via: Getty Images

Austin Reaves game 5 injury update



What did JJ Redick say about Austin Reaves



Austin Reaves injury update arrives at a crutial moment for the Los Angeles Lakers. A sweep slipped away after a flat Game 4 loss to the Houston Rockets. The 115-96 defeat exposed gaps in ball control and shot creation. LeBron James finished with just 10 points, while Deandre Ayton’s ejection broke any rhythm the team had left.Now the series moves forward with fresh urgency. The Lakers still lead 3-1, but the missed chance has shifted attention to who can return. According to Shams Charania, Reaves has a real shot at playing in Game 5. In contrast, Luka Doncic is ruled out for the rest of the series, making Reaves’ status even more important.The Austin Reaves game 5 injury update points to cautious optimism. The guard has been out since April 2 with a Grade 2 oblique strain, yet his status has quietly improved. He has been listed as questionable in recent games and even went through warmups, a sign that his return is getting close.Insider Brett Siegel shared a positive outlook on his recovery. “I would tend to believe the Lakers are feeling better about Austin Reaves' chances of being available for Game 5 in LA on Wednesday,” Siegel posted on X.“He has not had any setbacks over the last week, as the team has been comfortable easing him and not rushing him back with how this series has gone.” ESPN’s Shams Charania’s comment on his return also aligns with Siegel.Even if he suits up, expectations will stay measured. Reaves has missed weeks of action, and game rhythm takes time. Still, the Lakers only need one win to advance. A controlled return, even in limited minutes, could steady the offense and reduce pressure on James and the supporting cast.Head coach JJ Redick did not hide the team’s struggles without its key guards. After Game 4, he pointed to the missing pieces in clear terms. “That’s the biggest challenge we have is just the ball-handling and downhill drivers, not having those guys,” he said.That issue showed up in the numbers. The Lakers committed 24 turnovers, many coming at key moments. Without Reaves and Doncic, the offense looked slower and easier to disrupt. Yet, the first three games told a different story. Players like Marcus Smart, Luke Kennard, and Rui Hachimura stepped up, helping build the 3-0 lead.Game 5 now feels like a pivot point. Reaves could return at the right time, not to carry the team, but to restore balance. Houston, still without Kevin Durant, will try to extend the fight. The Lakers, meanwhile, are one steady performance away from moving on, with or without their full roster.
Article Summary: Austin Reaves has been out since April 2 with a Grade 2 oblique strain. He has been listed as questionable in recent games and even went through warmups, a sign that his return is getting close. Luka Doncic is ruled out for the rest of the series, making his status even more important.

Article Title: Bengaluru Employee Death News: Woman found dead in locked Bengaluru flat; blood on floor, torn papers add to mystery
Article Text:
Private company employee, Puja Dutta, was found dead in her Adugodi rented house under disturbing circumstances.

Poll What type of support do you think is most critical for individuals living alone? Community connections Regular check-ins

BENGALURU: A chilling incident has surfaced in Adugodi, where a 34-year-old private company employee, identified as Puja Dutta, was found dead in a disturbing condition inside her rented house on Monday night.Puja, originally from Hirapur in Dhanbad, Jharkhand, had been living alone in a rented house on the third floor of a multi-storey residential building in Adugodi for the last three years and was working in a private company.Her neighbours alerted the house owner about a foul smell emanating from the house, who subsequently informed the police. When police arrived at the spot, a locksmith was called to break open the door. They found her body in a naked and decomposed state, indicating that she may have died at least three days ago.The condition of the body has raised questions about whether it was a case of suicide or death caused by other reasons, as the body was found in a pool of blood. Torn papers were scattered in the room and a table fan was turned on next to her body.Police have shifted the body for post-mortem, and the exact cause of death will be known only after the report.Adugodi police are examining her phone call records and questioning acquaintances.Adding to the mystery, the house owner, Janakamma, revealed that Puja, who was unmarried, had been living there for the past three years and worked at a private firm. She mostly spoke in Hindi. Two bachelor youths who rented the adjacent house recently informed her about the foul smell.“I suspect that she may have taken her own life, as the door was locked from inside. She had also latched three bolts. The locksmith broke the lock using a hammer. There were cut marks on her body,” Janakamma said.She also stated that a man frequently visited Puja and that the two often had heated arguments, though the reason behind their disputes remains unclear. She further stated that Puja had a big speaker at her house and played loud music, disturbing others. “I had scolded her for playing loud music and asked her to vacate the house. She argued with me,” she added.“Last I saw her was on Thursday, when someone came to see the house for renting. After that, she was not seen,” Janakamma said.Police are now trying to trace the identity of the frequent visitor and piece together what transpired after Thursday. Adugodi police have taken up the case and are investigating.
Article Summary: Puja Dutta, a 34-year-old private company employee, was found dead in her rented house in Adugodi. Her body was found in a pool of blood and torn papers were scattered in the room. The house owner, Janakamma, revealed that Puja, who was unmarried, had been living there for the past three years and worked at a private firm.

Article Title: Serena Williams’ former coach Rick Macci reveals why Roger Federer's forehand beats Rafael Nadal and Novak Djokovic
Article Text:
Serena Williams’ former coach Rick Macci reveals why Roger Federer's forehand beats Rafael Nadal and Novak Djokovic (Image via Getty)

Rick Macci backs Roger Federer forehand and Novak Djokovic backhand as greatest ever

Roger Federer has always been part of the “greatest of all time” talk. His numbers already tell a big story. He won 103 ATP titles, which is the second-highest in men’s tennis history, just behind Jimmy Connors with 109. On the biggest stage, he lifted 20 Grand Slam titles, putting him behind Novak Djokovic and Rafael Nadal in the all-time list. But numbers are just one part of it. What really made Federer special was how he played, especially his forehand. Now, Serena Williams’ former coach Rick Macci has made it clear where he stands in this debate.Speaking to TSH Tennis, Macci said he believes Federer has the best forehand the sport has ever seen. His reason is simple: Federer made the game feel faster and more uncomfortable for his opponents in a way very few players could.Rick Macci did not hesitate when asked about the best forehand. He said, “I’d go with Federer. Here’s why. Simply because he was one of the first of the Mohicans.”He explained that Federer’s grip and timing made a big difference. “He played with a hybrid grip, like not really semi-western. He was between an eastern and a semi.He played right on the baseline, and he took it right off the bounce.”Then he shared something interesting from players who actually faced all three greats, Federer, Nadal, and Djokovic. “All of them said I’d rather play Djokovic and Nadal than Federer because when they went to play Federer, they just felt so rushed.”Macci added that while many people talk about Nadal’s heavy topspin, especially on clay, Federer’s forehand had a different kind of pressure. “I know a lot of people say Rafa because of all his spin, and obviously, on clay, you would say Nadal; he’s brutal to your backhand, but it would be Federer.”When the topic shifted to backhands, Macci was just as clear. He believes Novak Djokovic stands alone there. He said, “It’s not even close. It’s a rubber band man. The Serbian sniper, Djokovic.”He broke it down in simple terms. “His range of motion, the way he does it, right arm straight, left elbow bent, racket head above. He pulls with the right. He pushes with the left.”Macci also pointed out how easy Djokovic makes it look. “It looks like he’s eating breakfast when he hits the ball. He’s not even trying. Have you ever noticed that?”He ended it with a strong line: “His backhand is a knife through butter; it’s money in the bank. Djokovic by far.”Over the years, Djokovic also had the edge in head-to-head matches against both Federer and Nadal, which adds more weight to Macci’s view.
Article Summary: Rick Macci backs Roger Federer forehand and Novak Djokovic backhand as greatest ever. Serena Williams' former coach says Federer made the game feel faster and more uncomfortable for his opponents in a way very few players could. Macci added that while many people talk about Nadal’s heavy topspin, especially on clay, Federer's forehand had a different kind of pressure.

Article Title: Toronto Maple Leafs unlikely to trade Auston Matthews despite growing speculation after disappointing season
Article Text:
Auston Matthews suffered a Grade 3 MCL tear and quad contusion on the knee-on-knee play with Radko Gudas (Image via Imagn Images)

Toronto Maple Leafs expected to keep Auston Matthews despite post-season trade rumors

As the Toronto Maple Leafs are going through a transformation after playing a disappointing NHL season, uncertainty continues to loom around Auston Matthews’ career and future with the team. However, the latest rumors suggest that the Maple Leafs are not interested in trading the captain anytime soon during the NHL offseason.After a disappointing playoff finish this year, speculation has grown about whether Toronto could make dramatic roster changes, including the possibility of moving one of its biggest stars due to the major injury that kept him away from the team for the remainder of the season.According to earlier reports, Auston Matthews could not continue playing for the Toronto Maple Leafs, as he was sidelined for the remainder of the season due to a Grade 3 MCL tear and a quad contusion sustained in a knee-on-knee collision with Anaheim Ducks defenseman Radko Gudas. Despite the injury and trade speculation, many experts think that Matthews will continue to be the centerpiece of the franchise.The Toronto Maple Leafs are expected to keep Auston Matthews and plan to keep him on the team, despite growing trade rumors. The reason behind the heavy trade buzz was primarily because of the playoff disappointment, change in management and leadership, salary cap pressure, and contracts.Even Matthews himself dropped a subtle hint earlier of staying with the team when he took responsibility for the team’s failure. When asked about his future with the Leafs, Matthews stated, “I can’t really predict the future,” adding that it’s an honor to be captain and wear the jersey, but he’s unsure what lies ahead with new leadership coming.Meanwhile, Aaron Korolnek and Carlo Colaiacovo gave an opinion that the Toronto Maple Leafs seem uninterested in trading their captain, Auston Matthews. During an appearance on the show First Up this morning, they stated, “I don't think that's happening. I don't either, especially if this team, if their desire and their mandate for the person coming in is, hey, you got to make sure that we're back in the playoffs next year. I don't believe that trading Austin Matthews is on the top of the list.”They further discussed Toronto’s ongoing search for a new general manager and whether uncertainty around Matthews is affecting the hiring process. Amid the growing speculations about major organizational changes within the team, they believe that the Maple Leafs are not going to trade Auston Matthews anytime soon.Also, moving an elite player of Matthews’ caliber would be an enormous gamble and would be among the hardest tasks, making it difficult for Toronto to retool without his presence.Meanwhile, several top NHL teams like the San Jose Sharks and the Utah Mammoth have emerged as potential trade fits for Matthews, and he will be traded only when the Maple Leafs star decides to move. But, there is no confirmation yet far, as he remains under contract through 2027-28 with a full no-movement clause.
Article Summary: Toronto Maple Leafs expected to keep Auston Matthews despite post-season trade rumors. Matthews suffered a Grade 3 MCL tear and quad contusion on the knee-on- knee play with Radko Gudas. Despite the injury and trade speculation, many experts think that Matthews will continue to be the centerpiece of the franchise.

Article Title: Edmonton Oilers captain Connor McDavid questions Anaheim Ducks overtime goal after NHL Game 4 playoff loss
Article Text:
Connor McDavid of the Edmonton Oilers in action during the game against the Boston Bruins (Credit: Getty Images)

Connor McDavid discusses Anaheim Ducks overtime goal NHL Game 4

The Edmonton Oilers are on the brink of elimination after a dramatic Game 4 overtime loss to the Anaheim Ducks. The decisive goal, scored in overtime, quickly became the biggest talking point due to its controversial nature and tight review decision.Captain Connor McDavid addressed the moment post-game, raising questions about whether the puck clearly crossed the line. With the series now tilted heavily, the Oilers face mounting pressure heading into the next matchup.Connor McDavid said the overtime goal was “not exactly an oil painting,” highlighting how close and unclear the play appeared.The goal, scored by Ryan Poehling, came during a chaotic sequence where the puck was partially obscured by goaltender Tristan Jarry. Officials ruled it a goal on the ice, and after a detailed review, the NHL Situation Room upheld the decision.McDavid acknowledged the uncertainty, noting that similar plays in the past have gone either way. His reaction reflected frustration but also acceptance of playoff unpredictability, where marginal calls often decide outcomes.Earlier in the game, the Oilers built a strong lead with contributions from Kasperi Kapanen and Ryan Nugent-Hopkins.However, the Ducks responded through Cutter Gauthier and Mikael Granlund, setting up a tense finish.A power-play goal from Evan Bouchard briefly restored Edmonton’s lead before Jeffrey Viel equalized late in regulation. The back-and-forth contest ultimately led to overtime, where the controversial winner sealed the result.For the Oilers, the defeat carries significant implications. Once viewed as strong contenders, they now trail 3-1 in the series. The Ducks, meanwhile, are one win away from advancing, capitalizing on momentum and timely scoring.The focus now shifts to Game 5, where Edmonton must deliver a near-perfect performance to stay alive. McDavid’s comments underline the fine margins in playoff hockey and how a single moment, clear or not, can shape an entire series.
Article Summary: Edmonton Oilers are on the brink of elimination after a dramatic Game 4 overtime loss to the Anaheim Ducks. The decisive goal, scored by Ryan Poehling, quickly became the biggest talking point due to its controversial nature and tight review decision. Captain Connor McDavid said the overtime goal was “not exactly an oil painting,” highlighting how close and unclear the play appeared.

Article Title: New England Patriots clarify Mike Vrabel’s status as Dianna Russini disappears from the public eye
Article Text:
New England Patriots shares what is Mike Vrabel upto amid affair drama with Dianna Russini



What happened between Mike Vrabel and Dianna Russini?



Mike Vrabel and Dianna Russini’s alleged affairs have only continued to get worse after they initially denied being involved in an inappropriate relationship with each other.As the New England Patriots’ head coach Mike Vrabel seeks some time off to be by his family’s side, the team has opened up about him.While there were reports of how Mike Vrabel has been in regular contact with the New England Patriots for the NFL Draft, it seems that might not be the case.A few hours ago, Patriots Executive Vice President of Player Personnel Eliot Wolf dismissed such rumors on the the final day of the 2026 NFL Draft.As per MassLive's Mark Daniels, Patriots Executive Vice President of Player Personnel Eliot Wolf said, "So last night, you know, we kind of talked through things and made the decision that, you know, the time away really needs to be time away…”Eliot Wold added, “So we were not in contact with Mike today other than some just 'hope everything’s going okay' kind of text early this morning."Mike Vrabel’s decision to step away from the NFL Draft came at a time when more and more controversial details about his alleged affair with Dianna Russini were released to the publicJust a few hours after Mike Vrabel announced his decision, 2020 pictures of him and Dianna Russini sharing a kiss and sitting close at a New York City bar were released by Page Six.The pictures sparked shockwaves across the league as Dianna Russini quickly deleted her account on X.A few minutes later, Mike Vrabel announced that he will be taking some time off to seek counselling and be with his family.Interestingly, despite the evidence and strong trolling, neither Dianna Russini nor Mike Vrabel accepted the alleged affair rumors.While there have been rumors of Mike Vrabel’s wife seeking for a divorce, nothing has been confirmed yet as she remains out of the spotlight.For now, all eyes are on Mike Vrabel and Dianna Russini as their careers remain uncertain.
Article Summary: Mike Vrabel and Dianna Russini initially denied being involved in an inappropriate relationship with each other. The New England Patriots head coach announced that he will be taking some time off to seek counselling and be with his family. The Patriots Executive Vice President of Player Personnel Eliot Wolf dismissed such rumors on the final day of the 2026 NFL Draft.

Article Title: IPL 2026: Who is Sahil Parakh? Young Maharashtra batter makes debut for DC vs RCB
Article Text:
Sahil Parakh (Video grab)

Watch Yuzvendra Chahal on team mindset, high scores and bowling challenges in IPL Yuzvendra Chahal on team mindset, high scores and bowling challenges in IPL

Who is Sahil Parakh?

Left-handed batter and legbreak bowler SMAT record: M 2 | R 24 | HS 18 | Ave. 12.00 | SR 114.28

NEW DELHI: Young Maharashtra batter Sahil Parakh is making his debut for Delhi Capitals on Monday, as he comes into the playing XI as an opener alongside KL Rahul in their IPL 2026 match against defending champions Royal Challengers Bengaluru at the Arun Jaitley Stadium in New Delhi.The 18-year-old batter represented India at the Under-19 level in 2024 before earning a chance in the Maharashtra state side. He featured in two T20 matches in the Syed Mushtaq Ali Trophy last year. During his Under-19 stint, Parakh impressed with an unbeaten century — 109 off just 75 balls — against Australia in 2024.Parakh, a left-handed batter who can also bowl leg-spin, was picked up by Delhi Capitals in the IPL 2026 auction for Rs 30 lakh. DC skipper Axar Patel confirmed at the toss that the youngster would replace Sri Lanka’s Pathum Nissanka at the top of the order.But it turned out to be a debut to forget, as the youngster was clean bowled by veteran RCB seamer Bhuvneshwar Kumar for a two-ball duck, leaving DC reeling at 0/1 in just 0.2 overs.Speaking at the toss, Axar said: “I would have fielded if I won the toss. The ground dimensions are small, the pitch also gets better, so we would have chased as well.In the IPL, you score 264 and lose, but it is a long tournament. We had a good game with bat and ball; if we had held our chances, then the result would be different. You need to keep continuing doing the work. Even our best fielders drop catches, so luck is not on our side, but we can’t sit around thinking about it. We have two fast bowlers — Chameera and Jamieson are playing. We have to strike in the powerplay. Though Mukesh has done well, he needs a break and we are bringing in international bowlers.”Sahil Parakh, KL Rahul (w), Nitish Rana, Sameer Rizvi, Tristan Stubbs, David Miller, Axar Patel (c), Dushmantha Chameera, Kyle Jamieson, Kuldeep Yadav, T NatarajanVirat Kohli, Devdutt Padikkal, Rajat Patidar (c), Jitesh Sharma (w), Tim David, Romario Shepherd, Krunal Pandya, Bhuvneshwar Kumar, Josh Hazlewood, Suyash Sharma, Rasikh Salam Dar
Article Summary: Sahil Parakh makes debut for Delhi Capitals in IPL 2026 match against Royal Challengers Bengaluru. The 18-year-old left-handed batter was picked up by Delhi Capitals for Rs 30 lakh. Parakh was clean bowled by veteran RCB seamer Bhuvneshwar Kumar for two-ball duck.

Article Title: Real Madrid confirm Kylian Mbappe injury as Barcelona clash and 2026 FIFA World Cup loom large
Article Text:
Kylian Mbappe (Image Via Getty)

Kylian Mbappe’s absence could hurt Real Madrid and France at the biggest stage

The Independent

Real Madrid are facing a big problem at a crucial stage of the season after Kylian Mbappe picked up a fresh injury. The French star suffered a hamstring issue during Madrid’s 1-1 La Liga draw against Real Betis on April 24 and was taken off in the 81st minute, with Gonzalo Garcia replacing him. With El Clasico against Barcelona coming soon and the 2026 FIFA World Cup also getting closer, both club and country are now worried about his fitness.Real Madrid shared the medical update on April 27 after further tests and confirmed that Mbappe has an injury to the semitendinosus muscle in his left leg. However, the club did not give any timeline for his return. That has increased concern because Madrid have only five La Liga matches left, including a huge Clasico clash. Barcelona are currently eleven points ahead, making every remaining match very important for Carlo Ancelotti’s side.In their official statement, shared by Real Madrid and reported by, the club said: “Following the tests carried out on Monday on our player Kylian Mbappe by the Real Madrid Medical Services, he has been diagnosed with an injury to the semitendinosus muscle in his left leg. Awaiting progress.”This update is a major setback for Real Madrid because Mbappe has been their biggest attacking weapon this season. If he misses El Clasico, Madrid will lose their most dangerous forward in a match that could decide the league title.Even though the team has struggled in big competitions, Mbappe’s personal season has been excellent. He has scored 41 goals and provided six assists in 41 matches across all competitions. In La Liga alone, he has scored 24 goals and is leading the race for the Pichichi Trophy.Still, Madrid’s season has not gone as planned. They lost the Supercopa de España final to Barcelona and were knocked out of the UEFA Champions League by Bayern Munich in the quarter-finals. They also suffered an early Copa del Rey exit against Albacete.Now, all eyes are on Mbappe’s recovery. France will also be watching closely because he remains their biggest star for the 2026 FIFA World Cup. If recovery takes longer than expected, both Real Madrid and the French national team could face serious problems at the worst possible time.
Article Summary: Kylian Mbappe picked up a fresh injury against Real Betis on April 24. Real Madrid shared the medical update on April 27 after further tests and confirmed that he has an injury to the semitendinosus muscle in his left leg. However, the club did not give any timeline for his return. This update is a major setback for Real Madrid because MbappE has been their biggest attacking weapon this season.

Article Title: Dc Vs Rcb: DC batting collapse vs RCB: What is the lowest total in IPL history?
Article Text:
Photo/IPL

Watch Vijay Dahiya on Virat Kohli’s mindset and why experience still matters. Vijay Dahiya on Virat Kohli’s mindset and why experience still matters.

1. Royal Challengers Bengaluru (49) vs Kolkata Knight Riders (2017)

2. Rajasthan Royals (58) vs Royal Challengers Bengaluru (2009)

3. Rajasthan Royals (59) vs Royal Challengers Bengaluru in (2023)

4. Delhi Daredevils (66) vs Mumbai Indians (2017)

5. Delhi Daredevils (67) vs Kings XI Punjab In IPL 2017

Royal Challengers Bengaluru pacers Bhuvneshwar Kumar and Josh Hazlewood put Delhi Capitals under huge pressure on Monday, reducing them to 13 for 6 in the powerplay during their IPL 2026 match.It became the lowest powerplay score in a full IPL game.Both fast bowlers took three wickets each as Delhi’s top order collapsed early and RCB took control of the match.Their 13 for 6 after six overs broke the previous record for the lowest powerplay total in a full IPL match. At one stage, Delhi were also in danger of being bowled out for the lowest total in IPL history. However, in the end DC were bowled out for 75.The current lowest total in IPL history still belongs to Royal Challengers Bengaluru, who were bowled out for 49 against Kolkata Knight Riders in IPL 2017.That collapse happened at Eden Gardens when RCB were chasing 132. Their batting lineup was dismissed in just 9.4 overs, and no batter managed to score 10 or more. Nathan Coulter-Nile, Chris Woakes and Colin de Grandhomme took three wickets each.The second-lowest total in IPL history is 58 by Rajasthan Royals against RCB in IPL 2009.That match took place in South Africa during the opening weekend of the season. Anil Kumble led the attack with 5 wickets for 5 runs as Rajasthan were bowled out in 15.1 overs.Rajasthan Royals also hold the third-lowest total — 59 against RCB in IPL 2023.Chasing 172 in Jaipur, they lost five wickets inside the powerplay. Wayne Parnell took three wickets as the middle order failed to recover.The fourth-lowest IPL total is 66 by Delhi Daredevils against Mumbai Indians in IPL 2017.Mumbai had scored 212, and Delhi collapsed while trying to chase the big target. Harbhajan Singh and Karn Sharma took three wickets each as Delhi were all out in 13.4 overs.The fifth-lowest total is 67 by Delhi Daredevils against Kings XI Punjab, also in IPL 2017.In that game, Sandeep Sharma took 4 wickets for 20 runs and broke the top order early. Delhi were bowled out in 17.1 overs, and Punjab chased the target in less than eight overs without losing a wicket.
Article Summary: Royal Challengers Bengaluru pacers Bhuvneshwar Kumar and Josh Hazlewood took three wickets each as Delhi Capitals were bowled out for 75. It became the lowest powerplay score in a full IPL game. At one stage, Delhi were also in danger of being bowling out for the lowest total in IPL history.

After nine thrilling matches last week, a trend is beginning to emerge on which teams are on a roll and which are still struggling to settle into the new season. So far, 15 matches have been played in the new season of the IPL , and four teams have already set the early marker in the race for the playoffs.With four wins in four matches, Rajasthan Royals sit at the top of the points table. Punjab Kings are at second after two wins and a no result due to rain. They are followed by defending champions Royal Challengers Bengaluru, Delhi Capitals and Lucknow Super Giants, who have two wins each so far. Meanwhile, Chennai Super Kings and Kolkata Knight Riders are two winless teams in IPL 2026.With a win each, Sunrisers Hyderabad, Mumbai Indians, and Gujarat Titans have opened their account in the standings and will look to challenge the top four in coming fixtures.The ongoing IPL season has already witnessed multiple weather disruptions across the country. The KKR vs PBKS clash in Kolkata was washed out, while the RR vs MI encounter had to be curtailed to just 11 overs per side in which Rajasthan Royals outclassed Mumbai Indians by 27 runs. And on Wednesday, GT held their nerves to beat hosts DC by one run in a last-ball thriller.KKR lost their 3rd match in a row after Mukul Choudhary pulled off a record breaking chase for LSG in the last-ball thriller.Rajasthan Royals and Royal Challengers Bengaluru, face off in Guwahati on Friday.The weekend double-headers will see Punjab Kings take on Sunrisers Hyderabad and Chennai Super Kings face Delhi Capitals on Saturday, followed by Lucknow Super Giants vs Gujarat Titans and Mumbai Indians vs Royal Challengers Bengaluru on Sunday.There is likely to be plenty of shuffling in the points table this week.
Article Summary: Rajasthan Royals and Royal Challengers Bengaluru face off in Guwahati on Friday. Chennai Super Kings and Kolkata Knight Riders are two winless teams in IPL 2026. Sunrisers Hyderabad, Mumbai Indians, and Gujarat Titans have opened their account in the standings.

Article Title: Jake Dennis moves into Marbella home with fiancee Lexi Grace Boosey, shares glimpses of house and city

Article Title: As temperature soars, schools in Noida and Ghaziabad to shut at 12.30pm
Article Text:
Schools in Noida and Ghaziabad have revised their timings to 7:30 am to 12:30 pm due to a severe heatwave.

NOIDA: Schools across Noida and Ghaziabad will now run from 7.30 am to 12.30 pm with immediate effect, after district magistrates in both cities revised timings amid a persistent heatwave that has pushed temperatures above 40 degrees Celsius across the region.The directive covers institutions affiliated to CBSE , CISCE, IB, UP Board and other recognised boards. Officials said the decision was taken to shield students from peak afternoon heat and loo conditions, and asked schools to ensure strict compliance, ensure availability of drinking water and suspend all outdoor activities during the hottest part of the day.Earlier this week, both district administrations issued public heatwave advisories urging residents to stay hydrated, avoid sun exposure during peak hours and guard against heatstroke.The India Meteorological Department forecast continued hot weather conditions over the coming days, despite the possibility of light rain on Monday night and Tuesday. Officials said the revised timings would remain in force until conditions improve or fresh orders were issued.On Monday, IMD recorded a maximum temperature of 42.3 degrees Celsius, which was a departure of 3.3 degrees from normal. The day temperature is likely to remain around 42 degrees on Tuesday.Parents welcomed the move. “By the time school ends in the afternoon, the sun is too harsh. Children come back exhausted and complain of headaches. This is a much-needed step,” said Ritu Sharma, a parent from Sector 62, Noida.Amit Verma, a parent from Ghaziabad, said younger children were especially at risk. “Small children cannot tolerate this kind of weather. Early closure is safer, particularly for those who travel by vans or buses,” he said.Teachers, however, said that frequent changes in school timings could disrupt teaching pace and make syllabus completion difficult. “Such measures are necessary when weather conditions are severe and may lead to health risks. What is needed is a more consistent approach, avoiding closures or timing changes for minor weather fluctuations, like light rain, while reserving stricter steps for extreme conditions,” said a principal at a private school in Sector 44.
Article Summary: Schools across Noida and Ghaziabad will now run from 7.30 am to 12.30 pm. The directive covers institutions affiliated to CBSE, CISCE, IB, UP Board and other recognised boards. Officials said the decision was taken to shield students from peak afternoon heat and loo conditions.

Article Title: Ipl 2026: IPL 2026 security scare: 240 CCTV cameras sabotaged during RCB vs GT match
Article Text:
Image credit: BCCI/IPL

Watch Krunal Pandya on RCB’s performance and key turning points Krunal Pandya on RCB’s performance and key turning points

Who filed the complaint?

What was the reason behind the damage?

Poll Should there be stricter security measures during major events like IPL matches? Yes No

NEW DELHI: In a shocking development, the CCTV surveillance system at the M Chinnaswamy Stadium was damaged on the day of the IPL 2026 match between Royal Challengers Bengaluru and Gujarat Titans on April 24, according to a report by Deccan Herald.The report stated that more than 240 cameras were found non-functional, disrupting surveillance across key security areas on match day.Despite the chaos, defending champions RCB successfully chased down Gujarat Titans’ massive 205/3 in 18.5 overs.Cubbon Park police acted quickly and booked two individuals - Manjunath (37), a resident of Hiriyur in Chitradurga, and Abdul Kalam (19), from Uttar Pradesh."The incident took place on April 24 during the match. Both the accused were working under a sub-vendor of IVS Digital Solutions, providing digital services during match days," a senior police officer said.As per the report, Aditya Bhat, an employee of Staqu Technologies Pvt Ltd, a Gurugram-based firm that provides AI-driven surveillance solutions during match days, lodged a complaint with the police.He alleged that Manjunath and Abdul entered the CCTV control room without valid passes. He also accused them of damaging the Network Video Recorder (NVR) systems and related fibre connections.CCTV footage reportedly shows the duo accessing restricted areas.Due to the disruption, officials were unable to provide live surveillance feeds to police personnel deployed at the stadium.During the investigation, the accused reportedly told police that they had not been paid dues amounting to Rs 10 lakh.
Article Summary: CCTV surveillance system at the M Chinnaswamy Stadium was damaged on the day of the IPL 2026 match between Royal Challengers Bengaluru and Gujarat Titans. More than 240 cameras were found non-functional, disrupting surveillance across key security areas on match day.

Article Title: ‘Bhaiya nahi, brother’: Rinku Singh's family call with Sunil Narine steals the show - Watch
Article Text:
Rinku Singh's family call with Sunil Narine (Screengrabs)

Watch Bombay Sport Exchange: Munaf Patel on Gautam Gambhir, Virat vs Bumrah & Indian bowling. Bombay Sport Exchange: Munaf Patel on Gautam Gambhir, Virat vs Bumrah & Indian bowling.

NEW DELHI: Rinku Singh had match-winning impact both with the bat and on the field to help Kolkata Knight Riders pull off a thrilling victory over Lucknow Super Giants in IPL 2026 on Sunday.After the match, a light-hearted moment between Rinku, his family, and Narine caught fans’ attention.During a video call, Rinku’s sister greeted Narine by saying, “Hello bhaiya”. Rinku quickly corrected her, asking her to say “brother” instead since Narine doesn’t understand Hindi. Despite that, she continued praising him in Hindi, saying, “Bahut acchi bowling kari aapne. (You bowled really well)”Rinku then translated her words, leading Narine to respond with a smiling “Thank you very much”. The fun exchange left everyone laughing and quickly went viral online.Watch:KKR were in deep trouble at 93/7 when Rinku stepped in and turned the game around with an unbeaten 83 off 51 balls, guiding his team to 155/7. LSG matched the total, pushing the contest into a tense Super Over.There, Sunil Narine delivered under pressure, conceding just one run and taking two key wickets. KKR then chased the target on the very first ball, with Rinku hitting the winning runs to seal a memorable victory.Narine proved to be the game-changer in the Super Over, dismissing Nicholas Pooran and Aiden Markram to restrict LSG to just one run, the lowest-ever total in a Super Over.Rinku wasn’t just brilliant with the bat; he also impressed in the field, taking four catches and staying involved throughout the game. His performance earned him the Player of the Match award and capped off a remarkable all-round display in a high-pressure encounter.
